title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at CDSL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at CDSL are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About CDSL:
CDSL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDSL!
